_note: Per-key context for procedure-translate-spec-strings skill (FR-031b). Each entry: value (EN base), context (1-2 sentences explaining placement, tone, audience).

wizard_loading.context: Shown in the wizard host while the engine resolves the next step. Brief. Avoid technical wording.

wizard_next.context: Primary advance button at the bottom of every wizard step. Senior-safe (≥18sp, ≥56dp). Keep ≤ 10 chars to avoid layout issues in DE/RU.

wizard_skip.context: Secondary button shown on Optional steps. Senior-safe primitive. Should feel non-judgemental — user isn't 'giving up'.

wizard_back.context: Secondary navigation. System Back button, also a UI button on multi-screen steps.

wizard_back_at_first_step_toast.context: Toast shown when user presses System Back on step 0 of the wizard. Per Q-1 (b). Tone: gentle, instructive.

wizard_understood.context: Dismiss button on a tutorial hint overlay. Per FR-023 (TutorialHintOverlay). Friendly, confident.

ui_language_question.context: UIChoiceStep question text for the 'language' option in ui-customization.pool. First wizard step in many manifests.

system_setting_role_home_label.context: Title of the wizard step asking the user to grant ROLE_HOME. Per FR-053a. Senior persona: this is the single most consequential permission ask in the wizard.

system_setting_role_home_desc.value: Lets this app show whenever you press Home.
system_setting_role_home_desc.context: Plain-language explanation paired with the label. Avoid 'launcher' jargon — describe behaviour, not capability.

play_store_fallback_title.context: Shown when a bundled config has schemaVersion > known (FR-016 hard-fail). User cannot proceed; this screen replaces the wizard. Per Q-6 (b).

home_loading_error_title.context: Title displayed when home screen configuration fails to load. Tone: plain language, formal-but-warm, no technical jargon.

home_loading_error_retry.context: Primary button to retry loading configuration on the home screen error view. Senior-safe primitive.

home_loading_error_reset.context: Secondary button on home screen error view to initiate setup reset. Should clearly explain consequence without alarmism.

home_reset_dialog_message.value: All settings will be erased. Continue?
home_reset_dialog_message.context: Confirmation dialog body explaining that resetting will wipe existing app data. Tone: clear, elderly-friendly.

home_reset_dialog_confirm.context: Confirm action button inside the setup reset confirmation dialog.

home_reset_dialog_cancel.context: Cancel button inside the setup reset confirmation dialog.
